# Car Hire Maidenhead

Whether you need car hire in Maidenhead for a single day or several weeks, Fairview’s Bray branch has you covered. Based on Windsor Road, we offer a diverse range of cars to suit every type of driver and every kind of journey, from nipping into town to longer trips across the Thames Valley and beyond. With easy access from the M4 and just 10 minutes from Maidenhead town centre, collecting your hire car has never been more convenient.

[Hire Now](https://bookings.fairview-hire.co.uk/ "Hire Now") [Call Us Today](tel:01183151540 "Call Us")

### **How to Book A Car in Maidenhead**

Hiring a car in Maidenhead with Fairview couldn’t be simpler. Unlike larger national chains, where booking can feel impersonal and complicated, we’ve kept the process straightforward so you can focus on your journey rather than the admin. Here’s how it works:

- Browse our car fleet and choose the category that suits your trip, whether that’s a compact car for city driving, a family estate for a longer journey, or something in between.
- Select your collection and return dates, then add any requirements such as an additional named driver.
- Complete your booking through [our Fairview app](https://www.fairview-hire.co.uk/fairview-vehicle-hire-app/) or [online booking system](https://bookings.fairview-hire.co.uk/?_gl=1*1qoq6rg*_gcl_aw*R0NMLjE3Njc3ODk1OTAuQ2owS0NRaUFwZmpLQmhDMEFSSXNBTWlSX0l2TVQ0aGpZOWxXQjlwS1FmT2pUajJZODNwSVZKbzE1RFVJVUFzOTc0aU5IYjFtVjFMTVVJd2FBazcwRUFMd193Y0I.*_gcl_au*MTQ1ODg4MjM0OC4xNzY5NTIzMTEx*_ga*MzU5OTcyNjA3LjE3NjE3MzMwMTI.*_ga_75THRVSFQB*czE3NzIyMDczMDQkbzQ2JGcxJHQxNzcyMjA3NDUyJGo2MCRsMCRoMA..) in just a few clicks
- Prefer to speak to someone? Our team are also available by phone, email or contact form.
- Once your booking is confirmed, head to our Bray branch at 274 Windsor Road, just a short drive from Maidenhead town centre, and we’ll have your car ready and waiting.
- Pick up your keys and hit the road!

## Car Rental Maidenhead

Car rental in Maidenhead opens up the whole of the Thames Valley and beyond. The area is wonderfully well-connected, the M4 is on your doorstep and you can be in Central London in under an hour. You can head west towards Reading, Oxford and the Cotswolds with ease.

For those staying closer to home, car rental in Maidenhead gives you the flexibility to explore at your own pace, whether that’s a riverside drive along the Thames, a visit to [Windsor Castle](https://www.rct.uk/visit/windsor-castle), a family day at Legoland or a round of golf at one of the many courses dotted across Berkshire.

For drivers whose own car is off the road, whether for a service, MOT, or repair, our short-term car hire in Maidenhead is a practical and affordable solution. We want to keep you moving without disrupting your daily routine. And for those visiting the area for business, our proximity to Heathrow and the M4 corridor makes Fairview a natural choice for professional car rental in Maidenhead.

Whatever brings you to us, our range of cars ensures you’ll find the right fit. From fuel-efficient compact cars to larger family-sized vehicles, you can explore [our full car fleet](https://www.fairview-hire.co.uk/c/car-hire-in-london/) on our dedicated fleet page.

[Hire Now](https://bookings.fairview-hire.co.uk/ "Hire Now")

### Need Any Assistance?

Our experienced, friendly team are always on hand to help you with any questions you may have before you book your car with us.

[Call Our Team Now](tel:02035356548 "Give us a call")

[Contact Us Online](https://www.fairview-hire.co.uk/contact/ "Contact Us Online")

### **Frequently Asked Questions – Car Hire in Maidenhead**

- What age do I need to be to hire a car in Maidenhead?



Fairview requires all car hire customers to be aged between 25 and 65. This is an insurance requirement rather than an arbitrary rule.



If you sit just outside this bracket, it’s worth calling our Maidenhead branch directly, we may be able to refer your case to our insurers, though additional charges could apply.

- What documents are required to rent a car in Maidenhead?



When you arrive to collect your hire car, you’ll need three things:



  - a full UK DVLA driving licence held for at least two years
  - Proof of address no older than three months, such as a utility bill or bank statement
  - A credit or debit card in your name to cover the deposit.

It’s worth having these prepared in advance to make the collection process as smooth as possible.

- Do I need car hire excess insurance when renting in the UK?



Every car hire at Fairview includes basic protection as standard, but it’s worth being aware that the excess in the event of an accident is £3,000.



To give yourself greater peace of mind behind the wheel, we offer a range of optional protection packages at the time of booking that can significantly reduce your exposure.



These must be selected before your hire begins and cannot be added retrospectively.

- Can I rent a car in Maidenhead using a debit card?



Absolutely, we accept both debit and credit cards at our Maidenhead branch, as long as the card is registered in the name of the main hirer.



For business customers, payment on account or by Direct Debit can also be arranged with prior agreement from our team.

- Is same-day car hire available in Maidenhead?



In many cases, yes. If you need a car at short notice, perhaps your own vehicle has unexpectedly broken down or you have a last-minute trip to plan, [give our Bray branch a call](tel:01183151540), and we’ll check what’s available.



We’ll always do our best to get you moving as quickly as possible.

- How can I get to the car pick-up location in Maidenhead?



Our branch is at 274 Windsor Road, Bray, SL6 2DT. If you’re driving, we’re straightforward to reach from the M4 and well signposted from Maidenhead town centre along Windsor Road.



If you’re coming without a car, perhaps because yours is off the road, Maidenhead railway station is your nearest option, from where you can take a local bus service towards Bray. It’s worth factoring in a little extra travel time if you’re relying on public transport.

- What is the fuel/refuelling policy for car hires in Maidenhead?



Every car leaves our Bray branch with a full tank of fuel, and we ask that it’s returned in the same condition. If your car comes back with less than a full tank, the shortfall will be charged at the AA’s highest recorded pump price on the day of return, with a 20% administration fee added on top. To avoid any unexpected charges, we’d recommend filling up at a local petrol station before returning your car to us.

- What is the cancellation policy for car hire in Maidenhead?



Life doesn’t always go to plan, and we get that. If your circumstances change, you’re welcome to move your car hire booking to a future date free of charge.



If you need to cancel entirely, a fee of 30% of the total hire cost will be charged. Should you cancel within 48 hours of your scheduled collection, the full payment will be retained.



One thing to note, during peak periods such as school holidays, bank holidays, Easter and Christmas, cancellations within seven days of collection are non-refundable and cannot be rescheduled. We’d recommend taking out independent travel insurance if you’re booking during these times.

- Do you have any luxury cars available for hire in Maidenhead?



Our car fleet at the Bray branch covers a wide range of categories, and we carry more [premium options](https://www.fairview-hire.co.uk/c/prestige-car-hire-london/) for customers looking for something above the ordinary.



Whether you’re attending a corporate event or simply want to make a journey that little bit more enjoyable, get in touch with us and we’ll let you know what’s available and help you find the perfect car.
